# Champion Class Feats — Player Core 2 (PF2e Remastered)

Complete reference of all Champion class feats from Player Core 2 (PC2), including shared feats that also appear on the Champion feat list.

Source: [Archives of Nethys](https://2e.aonprd.com/) — Player Core 2 pg. 93–99

---

## Level 1 (11 feats)

### Brilliant Flash
- **ID:** 5881 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** Grandeur cause
- **Description:** When you use Flash of Grandeur, the attacker is also off-guard for 1 round.

### Defensive Advance
- **ID:** 5882 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion, Flourish, Guardian
- **Action:** ⬺ (2 actions)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You Raise your Shield and Stride. If you end your movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, you can make a melee Strike against that enemy. If your Speed is at least 10 feet, increase your shield's circumstance bonus to AC by 1 for the remainder of the current turn.

### Deity's Domain
- **ID:** 5883 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You claim a domain granted by your deity. Choose one domain offered by your deity. You gain an initial domain spell for that domain as a devotion spell.
- **Leads To:** Advanced Deity's Domain

### Desperate Prayer
- **ID:** 5884 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** ⭓ (free action)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 93
- **Frequency:** Once per day
- **Trigger:** You begin your turn and have no Focus Points.
- **Description:** You call out to your deity in a plea for their aid. You instantly recover 1 Focus Point. The Focus Point must be spent by the end of your turn or it is lost.

### Faithful Steed
- **ID:** 5885 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You gain a young animal companion as a mount. When you choose the animal companion, consider the animal's suitability as a mount. You can select abilities that require the mount special ability as if your companion has that ability, and your companion gains the mount special ability automatically when it becomes a mature animal companion.
- **Leads To:** Loyal Warhorse, Heal Mount, Imposing Destrier, Auspicious Mount

### Iron Repercussions
- **ID:** 5886 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** Obedience cause
- **Description:** When you use Iron Command, the persistent mental damage can be persistent spirit damage instead (your choice each time you use Iron Command).

### Nimble Reprisal
- **ID:** 5887 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** Justice cause
- **Description:** You can use Retributive Strike at greater distance. If the enemy that triggered Retributive Strike is within your reach but not adjacent to you, you can Step to become adjacent to the triggering enemy and make your Strike against that enemy with a –5 penalty instead of the normal –2. If the triggering enemy is within 15 feet but not within your reach, you can first Step toward the triggering enemy and then make a melee Strike against them with a –5 penalty.

### Ongoing Selfishness
- **ID:** 5888 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 94
- **Prerequisites:** Desecration cause
- **Description:** After you use Selfish Shield, you gain resistance to all further damage dealt by the triggering enemy equal to half the resistance from Selfish Shield until the end of the current turn.

### Unimpeded Step
- **ID:** 5889 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** Liberation cause
- **Description:** When an ally uses the movement from Liberating Step, they ignore difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, and uneven ground.

### Vicious Vengeance
- **ID:** 5890 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** Iniquity cause
- **Description:** You gain a circumstance bonus to your Destructive Vengeance damage equal to the number of damage dice.

### Weight of Guilt
- **ID:** 5891 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** Redemption cause
- **Description:** When a foe refuses your Glimpse of Redemption, you can choose to make them stupefied 2 instead of enfeebled 2.

---

## Level 2 (2 feats)

### Divine Grace
- **ID:** 5892 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Trigger:** You attempt a saving throw against a spell.
- **Description:** You call upon your deity's grace, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to the save.

### Divine Health
- **ID:** 5893 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your faith makes you resistant to ailments. You gain a +2 status bonus to saves against diseases and poisons. Allies in your champion's aura gain a +1 status bonus to saves against diseases and poisons. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a disease or poison, you get a critical success instead.

---

## Level 4 (5 feats)

### Aura of Courage
- **ID:** 5894 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura, holy
- **Description:** You are bolstered against fear, and your presence fortifies your allies. You reduce your frightened condition value by 1 (to a minimum of 0) at the start of your turn instead of at the end. Allies in your champion's aura reduce their frightened condition value by 1 at the end of your turn.

### Aura of Despair
- **ID:** 5895 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 95
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura, unholy
- **Description:** Your dark presence crushes the hope of others. When an enemy in your champion's aura would attempt a saving throw against a fear effect, it takes a –1 circumstance penalty to the saving throw. An enemy that is frightened can't reduce its frightened condition below 1 while it's in your aura.

### Cruelty
- **ID:** 5896 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** — (modifies casting)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Touch of the void
- **Description:** When you cast touch of the void using 2 actions, on a failed save the target also becomes enfeebled 1 for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute instead.
- **Leads To:** Greater Cruelty

### Mercy
- **ID:** 5897 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** — (modifies casting)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Lay on hands
- **Archetype:** Blessed One
- **Description:** Your devotion is strong as your healing flows through a welcomed ally. When you cast lay on hands, you can spend 2 actions instead of 1 to additionally attempt to counteract one condition on the target. Choose one mercy type to add to your options:
  - **Body:** counteract blinded, deafened, or sickened
  - **Grace:** counteract clumsy or enfeebled  
  - **Mind:** counteract confused, frightened, or stupefied
- **Leads To:** Greater Mercy, Affliction Mercy, Ultimate Mercy

### Security
- **ID:** 5898 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** — (modifies casting)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Shields of the spirit
- **Description:** When you cast shields of the spirit using 2 actions, choose an ally in your champion's aura. That ally gains a companion shield for 1 minute: a +1 circumstance bonus to AC while the shield is raised. The ally can use a Shield Block reaction as though they were wielding the shield.
- **Leads To:** Greater Security

---

## Level 6 (5 feats, including 2 shared)

### Expand Aura
- **ID:** 5899 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Champion, Concentrate
- **Action:** ◆ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura
- **Description:** You expand the radius of your champion's aura to 30 feet until the start of your next turn. At 10th level, the duration becomes 1 minute instead. At 16th level, you can dismiss it as a free action.

### Loyal Warhorse
- **ID:** 5900 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Faithful Steed
- **Description:** Your steed grows into a mighty companion. The mount you gained through Faithful Steed becomes a mature animal companion, granting it additional capabilities. It can never be induced to attack you, even by magical compulsion.
- **Leads To:** Imposing Destrier

### Smite
- **ID:** 5901 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Champion, Concentrate
- **Action:** ◆ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You designate your foe as the target of your wrath. Choose an enemy you can see. Your Strikes against that enemy gain a +3 status bonus to damage (+4 if your proficiency with your weapon is master). If you are holy, your Strikes against that enemy deal +4/+6 status bonus damage if the enemy is unholy. If you are unholy, your Strikes gain the same bonus against holy enemies. The smite effect extends beyond 1 round if the target takes hostile actions against you or your allies.

### Reactive Strike *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 5832 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Barbarian, Champion, Commander, Exemplar, Guardian, Magus, Swashbuckler
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 80
- **Archetype:** Marshal
- **Trigger:** A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.
- **Description:** You lash out at a foe that leaves an opening. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

### Shield Warden *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 4807 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Champion, Commander, Fighter
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 145, Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Archetype:** Bastion, Knight Vigilant, Ulfen Guard
- **Prerequisites:** Shield Block
- **Description:** When you have a shield raised, you can use your Shield Block reaction when an attack is made against an ally adjacent to you. If you do, the shield prevents that ally from taking damage instead of preventing you from taking damage, following the normal rules for Shield Block.
- **Leads To:** Shield of Grace, Shield of Reckoning

---

## Level 8 (8 feats, including 1 shared)

### Advanced Deity's Domain
- **ID:** 5902 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 96
- **Prerequisites:** Deity's Domain
- **Description:** You gain the advanced domain spell for the domain you chose with Deity's Domain as a devotion spell.

### Greater Cruelty
- **ID:** 5903 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Cruelty
- **Description:** When using Cruelty, you can choose to make the target clumsy or stupefied instead of enfeebled. The value and duration remain the same.

### Greater Mercy
- **ID:** 5904 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Archetype:** Blessed One
- **Prerequisites:** Mercy
- **Description:** Your mercy grows more powerful. You add the following conditions to those you can counteract with Mercy: drained, slowed, immobilized, paralyzed, and persistent damage. If you attempt to counteract persistent damage, choose one type of persistent damage affecting the target.

### Greater Security
- **ID:** 5905 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Security
- **Description:** The ally with a companion shield from your Security uses your shield's AC bonus when they Raise the companion shield. You can use Shield Block for the ally as if you were the one wielding the companion shield.

### Heal Mount
- **ID:** 5906 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Faithful Steed, lay on hands
- **Description:** When you use lay on hands on your mount, it restores 10 additional Hit Points, plus 10 for each heightened rank of lay on hands.

### Second Blessing
- **ID:** 5907 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Blessing of the devoted
- **Description:** Choose a second blessing of the devoted option to gain in addition to your first.

### Quick Shield Block *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 4816 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Champion, Fighter
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 147, Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Archetype:** Bastion, Viking
- **Prerequisites:** Shield Block
- **Description:** You can bring your shield into place with hardly a thought. At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to Shield Block.

---

## Level 10 (4 feats)

### Imposing Destrier
- **ID:** 5908 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Loyal Warhorse
- **Description:** Under your care, your mount has grown to become a particularly large and powerful specimen. Your mount becomes a nimble or savage animal companion (your choice). During an encounter, even if you don't use the Command an Animal action, your mount can still use 1 action on your turn that round to Stride or Step.
- **Leads To:** Auspicious Mount

### Radiant Armament
- **ID:** 5909 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed armament
- **Description:** Add astral and brilliant to the list of property runes you can choose for your blessed armament. If you are holy, add holy to the list. If you are unholy, add unholy. You can swap your blessed armament's property rune as a 10-minute activity that has the concentrate and divine traits.

### Shield of Reckoning
- **ID:** 5910 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 97
- **Frequency:** Once per round
- **Prerequisites:** Shield Warden, blessed shield, champion's reaction
- **Description:** When an enemy attacks an ally within your champion's aura, you combine your Shield Block and your champion's reaction to protect them. Use Shield Block for the ally and apply effects of your champion's reaction simultaneously.

### Spectral Advance
- **ID:** 5911 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Champion, Concentrate, Divine, Teleportation
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed swiftness
- **Description:** You gain the spectral advance devotion spell. This focus spell allows you to teleport a short distance, passing through obstacles, appearing in an unoccupied space.

---

## Level 12 (7 feats)

### Affliction Mercy
- **ID:** 5912 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Archetype:** Blessed One
- **Prerequisites:** Mercy
- **Description:** Add the mercy of recuperation to your mercy types. When you select this mercy type, you can attempt to counteract a curse, disease, or poison affecting the target.

### Aura of Faith
- **ID:** 5913 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Holy or unholy
- **Description:** Willing allies in your aura add holy (if you are holy) or unholy (if you are unholy) to their Strikes.

### Blessed Counterstrike
- **ID:** 5914 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion, Flourish
- **Action:** ◆ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy's damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)
- **Requirements:** An enemy triggered your champion's reaction since the end of your last turn.
- **Description:** You call upon divine power and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against the enemy who triggered your champion's reaction. On a hit, this Strike deals an extra damage die; the target also gains weakness to all Strikes from you and your allies until the start of your next turn.
- **Leads To:** Instrument of Zeal

### Champion's Sacrifice
- **ID:** 5915 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Not unholy
- **Description:** You gain the champion's sacrifice devotion spell. You form a link with an ally, allowing you to take harm in their stead.

### Devoted Focus
- **ID:** 5916 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Devotion spells
- **Description:** When you Refocus, you completely refill your focus pool (instead of recovering just 1 Focus Point).

### Divine Wall
- **ID:** 5917 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Requirements:** You are wielding a shield.
- **Description:** The squares adjacent to you are difficult terrain for enemies.

### Gruesome Strike
- **ID:** 5918 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** ◆ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)
- **Requirements:** Your Strikes currently deal extra damage from your champion's reaction.
- **Description:** Make a Strike against the creature that triggered your champion's reaction. If the Strike hits, the extra damage from your champion's reaction is doubled. The target must also attempt a Fortitude save or become drained 1.

---

## Level 14 (4 feats)

### Aura of Determination
- **ID:** 5919 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura
- **Description:** Your aura protects against powers that would twist the mind and body. You and all allies in your champion's aura gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against mental, morph, and polymorph effects.

### Aura of Life
- **ID:** 5920 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura
- **Description:** Your aura protects against the power of the Void. You and all allies in your champion's aura gain resistance 5 to void damage and a +1 status bonus to saves against void effects.

### Aura of Righteousness
- **ID:** 5921 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's aura, holy
- **Description:** Your righteous aura dampens evil's might and prevents the unholy from escaping you. You and all allies in your champion's aura gain resistance 5 to unholy spells, unholy Strikes, and other unholy effects. If a teleportation spell or effect would teleport an unholy creature out of your champion's aura, your aura attempts to counteract it, using the spell rank and DC of your devotion spells.

### Divine Reflexes
- **ID:** 5922 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only for your champion's reaction.

---

## Level 16 (4 feats)

### Auspicious Mount
- **ID:** 5923 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 98
- **Prerequisites:** Imposing Destrier
- **Description:** Guided by your ongoing care, your steed has developed incredible intelligence and skill. The mount you gained with Faithful Steed is now a specialized animal companion. You can select one of the usual specializations or the **auspice specialization**, which grants:
  - It gains the celestial, fiend, or monitor trait (matching your deity's servitors), plus holy (celestial) or unholy (fiend).
  - Its Intelligence modifier increases by 2 and Wisdom modifier by 1.
  - Its proficiency rank in Religion increases to expert.
  - It speaks the language associated with your deity's servitors (e.g. Empyrean, Chthonian, Requian).
  - Its maximum HP increase by 20 (25 at 18th, 30 at 20th). Celestial: +5 extra HP and weakness 5 to unholy. Fiend: +5 extra HP and weakness 5 to holy.
  - It gains wings granting a fly Speed equal to its land Speed.

### Instrument of Slaughter
- **ID:** 5924 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)
- **Description:** Your blessed armament thirsts for the blood of your foes. Whenever you critically hit an enemy with a Strike that has the extra damage from your champion's reaction, the target also takes persistent bleed damage equal to two of the weapon's damage dice.

### Instrument of Zeal
- **ID:** 5925 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed Counterstrike or Retributive Strike; champion's reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy's damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)
- **Description:** Divine energy fills your weapon. Whenever you critically hit an enemy with Blessed Counterstrike or Retributive Strike, your attack deals an extra weapon damage die, and the target is slowed 1 on its next turn.

### Shield of Grace
- **ID:** 5926 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Shield Warden
- **Description:** You protect an ally with both your shield and your body. Whenever you use the Shield Block reaction to prevent damage to an ally, you can evenly split the remaining damage after the Shield Block between the ally and yourself.

---

## Level 18 (3 feats)

### Rejuvenating Touch
- **ID:** 5927 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Archetype:** Blessed One
- **Prerequisites:** Lay on hands
- **Description:** Your healing energies linger after you cast, providing continual benefits. An ally that recovers Hit Points from your lay on hands gains 10 temporary Hit Points immediately and at the start of their turn during each of the next 10 rounds. These temporary HP last until the start of the creature's next turn. This effect ends if the ally is knocked unconscious.

### Swift Retribution
- **ID:** 5928 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Champion's reaction
- **Description:** The transgressions of your enemies fuel you to retaliate with divine speed. When an enemy triggers your champion's reaction, you are quickened on your next turn. You can use the extra action to move closer to that enemy or to Strike that enemy.

### Ultimate Mercy
- **ID:** 5929 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Archetype:** Blessed One
- **Prerequisites:** Mercy
- **Description:** Your mercy transcends the bounds of life and death. Add ultimate mercy to the types of mercy you can provide. When you use Mercy, you can target a creature that died since your last turn to return it to life. The target returns to life with 1 Hit Point and becomes wounded 1. You can't return the target to life if it died from disintegrate or a death effect. The creature gains the other benefits of lay on hands after it returns to life.

---

## Level 20 (4 feats)

### Armament Paragon
- **ID:** 5930 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed armament
- **Description:** Add the following property runes to the list you can choose for your blessed armament: animated, greater fearsome, grievous, keen, and greater vitalizing. If you have the Radiant Armament feat, add greater astral and greater brilliant to the list as well. In addition, you can change the rune you've selected for the day to a different rune from your list as a single action that has the concentrate and divine traits. Changing the rune doesn't restore abilities that can be used only a limited number of times.

### Sacred Defender
- **ID:** 5931 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You are a great warrior that can stand strong against the fiercest opponents to your cause. You gain resistance 5 to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. If you're holy, this resistance increases to 10 against unholy creatures, and if you're unholy it increases to 10 against holy creatures. In addition, creatures and effects that roll a natural 20 on an attack roll against you don't improve their result by one degree of success.

### Shield Paragon
- **ID:** 5932 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed shield
- **Description:** Your shield is a vessel of divine protection. When you're wielding your chosen shield, it is always raised, even without you using the Raise a Shield action. If the shield would be destroyed, it vanishes to your deity's realm instead, where a servitor of your deity repairs it. During your next daily preparations, the shield returns to you fully repaired. While the shield is gone, you can spend 1 minute to infuse a different shield with your blessed shield benefit until your true shield returns.

### Swift Paragon
- **ID:** 5933 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Champion
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core 2 pg. 99
- **Prerequisites:** Blessed swiftness
- **Description:** The movement of you and your allies is swift and decisive as the judgment of your deity. If your ally starts a move action in your champion's aura, their movement during that action doesn't trigger reactions. In addition, you're permanently quickened. You can use your extra action only to Step or Stride. If you have a fly Speed, add Fly to this list. If you have an animal companion and are mounted on it at the start of your turn, you can have your mount be quickened that turn instead of you.

---

## Summary Table

| Level | # Feats | Feat Names |
|-------|---------|------------|
| 1 | 11 | Brilliant Flash, Defensive Advance, Deity's Domain, Desperate Prayer, Faithful Steed, Iron Repercussions, Nimble Reprisal, Ongoing Selfishness, Unimpeded Step, Vicious Vengeance, Weight of Guilt |
| 2 | 2 | Divine Grace, Divine Health |
| 4 | 5 | Aura of Courage, Aura of Despair, Cruelty, Mercy, Security |
| 6 | 5 | Expand Aura, Loyal Warhorse, Smite, Reactive Strike*, Shield Warden* |
| 8 | 8 | Advanced Deity's Domain, Greater Cruelty, Greater Mercy, Greater Security, Heal Mount, Second Blessing, Quick Shield Block* |
| 10 | 4 | Imposing Destrier, Radiant Armament, Shield of Reckoning, Spectral Advance |
| 12 | 7 | Affliction Mercy, Aura of Faith, Blessed Counterstrike, Champion's Sacrifice, Devoted Focus, Divine Wall, Gruesome Strike |
| 14 | 4 | Aura of Determination, Aura of Life, Aura of Righteousness, Divine Reflexes |
| 16 | 4 | Auspicious Mount, Instrument of Slaughter, Instrument of Zeal, Shield of Grace |
| 18 | 3 | Rejuvenating Touch, Swift Retribution, Ultimate Mercy |
| 20 | 4 | Armament Paragon, Sacred Defender, Shield Paragon, Swift Paragon |
| **Total** | **57** | *(\* = shared feats also available to other classes)* |

---

## Cause-Specific Feat Chains

### Holy Causes (Grandeur, Justice, Liberation, Redemption)
- **Reaction grants:** Ally resistance to damage
- **Level 1 cause feats:** Brilliant Flash (grandeur), Nimble Reprisal (justice), Unimpeded Step (liberation), Weight of Guilt (redemption)
- **Key feats:** Blessed Counterstrike (12), Instrument of Zeal (16), Aura of Courage (4), Aura of Righteousness (14)

### Unholy Causes (Desecration, Iniquity, Obedience)
- **Reaction grants:** Extra damage on Strikes
- **Level 1 cause feats:** Ongoing Selfishness (desecration), Vicious Vengeance (iniquity), Iron Repercussions (obedience)
- **Key feats:** Gruesome Strike (12), Instrument of Slaughter (16), Aura of Despair (4)

### Blessing Path
- Blessed Armament → Radiant Armament (10) → Armament Paragon (20)
- Blessed Shield → Shield of Reckoning (10) → Shield Paragon (20)
- Blessed Swiftness → Spectral Advance (10) → Swift Paragon (20)

### Mount Path
- Faithful Steed (1) → Loyal Warhorse (6) → Imposing Destrier (10) → Auspicious Mount (16)
- Heal Mount (8) supports the mount chain

### Healing Path
- Lay on Hands → Mercy (4) → Greater Mercy (8) → Affliction Mercy (12) → Ultimate Mercy (18)
- Lay on Hands → Rejuvenating Touch (18)
- Touch of the Void → Cruelty (4) → Greater Cruelty (8)
- Shields of the Spirit → Security (4) → Greater Security (8)

### Domain Path
- Deity's Domain (1) → Advanced Deity's Domain (8)

### Shield Path
- Shield Block → Shield Warden (6) → Shield of Reckoning (10) / Shield of Grace (16)
- Shield Block → Quick Shield Block (8)
